response_text:
Yes — as stated, this resolves the specific CAP-030 inconsistency I identified.

The inconsistency was:

YAML
header: CAP-030 promoted to verified
section_2: Status: proposed
capability_inventory: unclear / inconsistent

Your closure update now makes the three relevant locations consistent:

YAML
header: CAP-030 promoted to verified
section_2: Status: verified
capability_inventory.md: Status: verified

So for this item:

YAML
CAP_030_status_inconsistency: resolved
blocking_or_limitation_status: closed

This does not by itself close the other remaining condition:

YAML
smoke_suite: still pending
next_step_requires_user_decision: yes

Final confirmation: CAP-030 inconsistency is resolved; CDP execution layer remains conditional only because smoke suite is still pending unless explicitly waived.
